narrative.headline: 2018 Kia Soul: engine complaints dominate
narrative.summary: Owners filed 205 complaints with NHTSA. Engine is the standout area at 63% of all reports (129 of them) and accounts for 10 of the 12 reported fires. Power train comes a distant second (30 reports, 15%). The air bag complaints are far fewer (11, 5%) but the most severe per report, tied to 8 crashes and 8 injuries. No deaths are reported in any category.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: By far the biggest complaint area: 129 reports (63%), with 10 fires and 1 crash but no reported injuries. The fires make this the one to inspect most closely.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: The second most reported area: 30 reports (15%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Only 11 reports (5%), but the most serious per report: 8 crashes and 8 injuries, the most of any area. Worth a close look despite the low count.
